headline: 痴迷领跑今日热搜，福尔摩斯小姐3热度不减
headlineEn: Obsession Tops Today's Trending, Enola Holmes 3 Stays Hot
summary: 今日娱乐新闻：无新片上映，但《痴迷》和《福尔摩斯小姐3》持续霸榜，本周《达顿牧场》等新作备受关注。
summaryEn: Entertainment news today: No new releases, but 'Obsession' and 'Enola Holmes 3' dominate charts; 'Dutton Ranch' among this week's most anticipated.

topTrends.title: 无职转生：到了异世界就拿出真本事

industryHighlights.text: 《末日地堡》与《气体人第一号》跻身今日热搜
industryHighlights.en: 'Silo' and 'The First Gas Man' enter today's trending

industryHighlights.text: 本周《超级少女》《小黄人与大怪兽》热度上升
industryHighlights.en: 'Supergirl' and 'Minions and Monsters' gain traction this week

industryHighlights.text: 未来新片《安昂传奇》《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》备受期待
industryHighlights.en: Upcoming films 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' and 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day' highly anticipated
